'''竏嗚-ng-t-p''' ('''kajangtepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylograph|xylograph]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-t-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylograph|xylograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗚-ng-t-p
|-
! Lemma
| kajangtepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijangtepoko|thijangtepoko]] || [[word:jijangtepoko|jijangtepoko]] || [[word:shijangtepoko|shijangtepoko]] || [[word:kijangtepoko|kijangtepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojangtepoko|thojangtepoko]] || [[word:jojangtepoko|jojangtepoko]] || [[word:shojangtepoko|shojangtepoko]] || [[word:kojangtepoko|kojangtepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦjangtepoko|thﾃｦjangtepoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦjangtepoko|jﾃｦjangtepoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦjangtepoko|shﾃｦjangtepoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦjangtepoko|kﾃｦjangtepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajangtepoko|thathajangtepoko]] || [[word:jajajangtepoko|jajajangtepoko]] || [[word:shashajangtepoko|shashajangtepoko]] || [[word:kakajangtepoko|kakajangtepoko]]
|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
